title_en: ChatGPT Pro $100 Plan Now Available with 5X Codex Limits
summary_en: OpenAI launches new $100/month tier filling gap between $20 Plus and $200 Pro plans. Offers 5X more usage limits for developers and heavy users.

title_en: Meta AI App Hits #5 After Muse Spark Launch
summary_en: Meta's new proprietary AI model drives massive app adoption, jumping from #57 to #5 on App Store. Marks shift away from open-source Llama strategy.

title_en: LLM Traffic Converts 30-40% Higher Than Traditional Search
summary_en: AI-referred traffic dramatically outperforms regular search in conversion rates. Most enterprises missing opportunity by not optimizing for generative engines.

title_en: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Finds Thousands of Security Vulnerabilities
summary_en: New AI model autonomously discovered vulnerabilities that survived 27 years of human review. Single campaign cost $20,000, individual bug discovery under $50.

title_en: OpenAI Academy: Custom GPTs for Business Automation
summary_en: Learn to build purpose-built AI assistants that automate workflows and maintain consistent outputs. Official training from OpenAI for business applications.

title_en: ChatGPT for Customer Success Teams Training
summary_en: Master AI tools for account management, communication improvement, churn reduction, and driving renewals. Comprehensive guide for CS professionals.

title_en: Research with ChatGPT: Search and Deep Analysis
summary_en: Learn advanced research techniques using AI for up-to-date information gathering, source analysis, and structured insight generation for business decisions.

title_en: Data Analysis with ChatGPT Complete Guide
summary_en: Master dataset exploration, insight generation, and visualization creation with AI. Turn data findings into actionable business decisions efficiently.

title_en: AI for Financial Services: Tools and Implementation
summary_en: Comprehensive AI resources including prompt packs, GPTs, and deployment guides. Help financial institutions scale AI securely and profitably.

title_en: Answer Engine Optimization: New $30-40% Conversion Strategy
summary_en: AI agents consume information differently than humans, creating new optimization opportunities. Learn how to capture high-converting AI-referred traffic.

title_en: AI Overviews Cut Organic Traffic 58% - Paid Search Adaptation
summary_en: Google's AI Overviews appear in 30% of searches, drastically reducing clicks. Learn how paid search teams are adapting strategies to maintain revenue.

title_en: Intuit's AI Workflow Compresses Months into Hours
summary_en: TurboTax team used AI to implement 900-page tax code in days instead of months. Replicable workflow combining commercial AI with custom frameworks.

title_en: AI Agents Create New Enterprise Security Challenges
summary_en: Autonomous AI agents execute code faster than traditional security controls can manage. New architectures needed for credential isolation and action control.

title_en: Claude vs OpenClaw: AI Agents Comparison Guide
summary_en: Comprehensive comparison of powerful autonomous AI agents reshaping work automation. Learn capabilities, limitations, and business applications of each platform.

title_en: Meta Abandons Open Source with New Muse Spark Model
summary_en: Meta launches first proprietary AI model since forming Superintelligence Labs. Marks major shift away from open-source Llama strategy after mixed reviews.

title_en: Microsoft's Open-Source AI Agent Security Toolkit
summary_en: New runtime security toolkit forces strict governance on enterprise AI agents. Addresses growing concern over autonomous models executing uncontrolled code.

title_en: IBM: AI Governance Protects Enterprise Profit Margins
summary_en: Robust AI governance essential for protecting business margins as AI moves from product to platform. Investment in secure infrastructure drives long-term profitability.

title_en: Apple Building Limited AI Agents with Built-in Restrictions
summary_en: Next-generation AI assistants from Apple and Qualcomm designed with intentional limits. Can navigate apps and manage tasks but with safety constraints.

title_en: EU AI Act Creates Governance Challenges for Agentic AI
summary_en: AI agents that act without clear audit trails pose compliance problems under 2026 regulations. IT leaders need traceability solutions for automated decisions.

title_en: Writing with ChatGPT: Structure, Tone and Intent Mastery
summary_en: Learn advanced prompting techniques for content creation, revision, and refinement. Master clear structure, appropriate tone, and purposeful intent in AI-generated writing.
